company_context: Emerge.com - Hilco Digital Assets Skip to content Emerge.com Serious inquiries only: [email protected]

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours optimize their data management. I came across Emerge.com and was impressed with the work you're doing in digital assets. Can I have a few minutes to discuss how our solution can help?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (sighs) Okay, I'm listening. But make it quick. We're in the middle of a critical project and I don't have a lot of time to spare. What makes your solution so special?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely, I understand your time is valuable. Our DeepData AI solution uses machine learning to automate data processing, reducing manual errors and increasing efficiency by up to 50%. We've seen significant success with similar companies in the digital asset space.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (skeptical) That sounds interesting, but we're currently using a competitor's solution that's working okay for us. What makes you think we'd be willing to switch, especially considering the cost and time it would take to integrate a new system?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your concerns about integration and cost. However, our solution is designed to be highly adaptable and can integrate seamlessly with your existing infrastructure. As for the cost, we've found that our solution pays for itself through the efficiencies it creates. I'd be happy to provide a customized ROI analysis to demonstrate this.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (still skeptical) I appreciate the offer, but we're on a tight budget this quarter and I'm not sure we can justify the expense. Can you tell me more about your pricing model and what we can expect to pay?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our pricing is tiered based on the volume of data processed. For a company of your size, we're looking at around $50,000 per year, with discounts available for multi-year commitments. I believe this is a competitive price point considering the value our solution provides.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (pauses, considering) I have to say, I'm intrigued by what you're offering, but $50,000 is out of our budget for this year. We've already allocated our spending for the quarter and I don't see us being able to make that work. I appreciate the pitch, Alex, but I think we're going to have to pass on DeepData AI for now.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand, and I appreciate your honesty. If you're open to it, I could discuss possible alternatives or a pilot project to demonstrate the value of our solution with less upfront commitment.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (firmly) I appreciate the offer, Alex, but I think we're going to have to decline. The price point is just too high for us, and we can't justify the expense at this time. Thank you for your understanding.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller should have been more prepared to address the buyer's budget concerns and potentially offer more flexible pricing options or a smaller-scale pilot project to reduce the upfront cost. Sentiment: Neutral
